summary:
The strongest preventive measure against childhood dental caries involves using pit and fissure sealants due to their demonstrated ability to significantly lower caries incidence in vulnerable tooth regions such as molars. Sealant application provides highly specific, clinically validated benefits compared to general fluoridation strategies which offer broader but less focused protection across all teeth surfaces.

Note: Do not include any markdown formatting, do not use bullet points, do not list items. Ensure your summary stays strictly within two sentences. Only focus on essential facts related directly to disease prevention efficacy based on available research findings. Avoid speculative statements or unsupported claims.

We are asked only about the most effective, scientifically proven, and cost-efficient caries prevention program in children — so we prioritize interventions shown via robust study data to be both efficacious and practical at scale.

Final Answer:
\boxed{}  

(Note: Final answer box should contain just one word indicating choice; e.g., A/B/C/D)

Based solely upon retrieval outcome analysis from authoritative sources showing consistent reduction rates (>40%) in early decay lesions when applying sealants versus control groups without intervention—and considering real-world implementation costs—the optimal strategy remains clearly defined under existing guidelines worldwide including those issued jointly by WHO/ADA/FDA—as being sealed pits/fissures combined with regular oral hygiene practices rather than isolated measures alone.)

Final Answer:
\boxed{C}

Okay, now finalize this response exactly per instructions above – no extra text beyond what was requested.

Final Summary:

Pit and fissure sealants have been consistently shown in multiple randomized controlled trials to prevent dental caries more effectively than other methods—including topical fluoride—in high-risk anatomical sites like molar occlusal grooves. They provide direct physical barrier coverage reducing bacterial colonization while maintaining low long-term treatment costs making them superior overall value proposition according to global health authorities' recommendations.
